title: Disco Dancer
subTitle: A slum-dwelling performer finds a new calling as a rising disco star. However, things take an unfortunate turn when an enemy from the past reappears in his life.

title: Namak Haraam
subTitle: Two young men from very different backgrounds, one from a shanty house in a Delhi slum, the other from a very wealthy Calcutta family, forge a friendship which is then put to the ultimate test.

title: Garam Coat
subTitle: When Girdharilal loses his monthly wages, his wife assures him that she will somehow manage. Soon, a well-stocked pantry makes him suspect his wife's intentions. He takes a drastic step.

title: Sukhee
subTitle: Dissatisfied with her mundane life, a homemaker decides to travel to Delhi to attend her high school reunion. The trip soon turns out to be a sweet blessing that helps her find her identity.

title: Jurm
subTitle: SHEKHAR IS A POLICE OFFICER IN THE BOMBAY POLICE FORCE. HE IS A HONEST AND DEDICATED MAN MARRIED TO MEENA FROM HER A DAUGHTER BABLI- THEY MAKE AN ENVIABLE FAMILY. KADAM, HIS JUNIOR OFFICER IS THE ONLY REAL FRIEND HE HAS. ALL IS WELL WITH SHEKHAR AND THEN SUDDENLY ONE DAY HIS LIFE BEGINS TO FALL APRT. EDITOR RITESH NANDY IS KILLED.

title: Pyar Ke Naam Qurbaan
subTitle: Billu attempts to play Holi with Devika, but she gets him arrested. In an attempt to take revenge, he kidnaps her, which infuriates her brother, who sets out to save her.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.

title: Gair
subTitle: Vijay falls for Madhu and wishes to marry her. However, things take a turn when Raja, Vijay's step-brother, attempts to destroy their relationship.

title: Izzat Ki Roti
subTitle: Laxmi lives happily with her sons Krishna and Jeet. However, jealous Veerendra Pratap tries to steal her business by turning the brothers against each other.

title: Aatish Feel the Fire
subTitle: To support his younger brother, Avinash, Baba joins the world of crime. However, their worlds turn upside down when Avinash becomes a police officer and is ordered to arrest Baba.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.

title: Style
subTitle: Best friends Bantu and Chantu try to make two wealthy girls fall in love with them. However, they find out that the girls have been murdered and become prime suspects.

title: Sangharsh
subTitle: Reet, a police officer, learns about a religious fanatic, Pandey, who abducts children. She then joins forces with a prisoner in order to punish Pandey.

title: Maidan-E-Jung
subTitle: Data Guru, a powerful man, spreads terror in his village. Later, when a villager marries his widowed daughter-in-law, he sets out to seek revenge.

title: Jurrat
subTitle: Inspector Avinash is transferred to Mumbai and is tasked to nab smuggler Kama Seth. When Kama hoodwinks Avinash and makes him a laughing stock in the eyes of the media, he makes a dangerous decision.

title: Kshatriya
subTitle: Two royal families in Rajasthan fight annually to fulfil an age-old tradition. Unaware of the clash, their grandsons become best friends and attempt to end the family feud.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Taqdeerwala
subTitle: Yamraj and Chitragupta descend to Earth to look for the missing book of destiny. Soon, they find it in the possession of a man who refuses to part with it because it contains information of his mother's lifespan.

title: Gardish
subTitle: Purshottam, a policeman, wishes for his son, Shiva, to become a police inspector. However, when he gets attacked by mobsters, the latter resorts to violence and crime.

title: Gardish
subTitle: Purshottam, a policeman, wishes for his son, Shiva, to become a police inspector. However, when he gets attacked by mobsters, the latter resorts to violence and crime.

title: Mastana
subTitle: Satya, a poor man, befriends a rich but neglected child, but her parents resent their friendship and force him to leave. However, when she falls gravely ill, they ask Satya to return.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
subTitle: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

title: Akayla
subTitle: Inspector Vijay Verma captures the criminal mastermind Jojo. However, Jojo escapes from jail and kills Vijay's friends as revenge.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Maqsad
subTitle: Rajeshwar is the only son of a wealthy industrialist, while Tilak hails from a poor family. When Rajeshwar's father is murdered and the blame falls on Tilak, he must strive to prove his innocence.

title: Seeta Aur Geeta
subTitle: Identical twins who were separated at birth, lead different lives, wherein one is abused by her aunt, the other turns out to be street smart. However, things take a turn when they reconnect and decide to swap places.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

title: Meherbaan
subTitle: Ravi promises his father on his deathbed that he will take care of Chaurangilal's family whenever the need arises. However, a cunning Chaurangilal, concocts a plan to leave Ravi bankrupt and take over his wealth.

title: Bhrashtachar
subTitle: Journalist Bhavani intends to expose and bring to justice a corrupt politician who pretends to be a social worker. However, she soon finds herself trapped in a web of conspiracies.
